idea: Utility Sector Outflow on Mild Weather Pivot

data.source: Open-Meteo daily heating degree days (HDD) and cooling degree days (CDD) for US population-weighted centers

behavior: When rolling 7-day average HDD drops sharply from seasonal baseline, heating demand collapses, reducing utility stock appeal and triggering rotation out of XLU into risk assets.

market_impact.rationale: Lower heating demand directly reduces utility revenue and crushes relative valuation of defensive utility stocks.

trade_logic.entry: If 7-day rolling HDD falls below historical seasonal average by >15% and XLU closes down 1%+ that day
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when HDD returns to seasonal norm

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weather patterns shift weekly; mild snaps occur multiple times per winter/spring season, reliably triggering HDD collapses.

data.source: AAR (Association of American Railroads) weekly carload data via FRED series RAILCDF (carloads and intermodal) or scrape public AAR reports

behavior: Weekly carload volume spikes above 12-week moving average signal sudden demand recovery in manufacturing and commodities, bullish for industrials and materials.

market_impact.rationale: Rail volume is a leading proxy for real economic activity; spikes correlate with factory orders and industrial production acceleration.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly carload count exceeds 12-week MA by >5% and volume increases YoY
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or when carloads fall back below 12-week MA

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal demand swings and supply-chain normalization events trigger rail spikes several times per quarter.

idea: Natural Gas Volatility Spike Reversal in Energy

data.source: FRED series DHHNGSP (Henry Hub natural gas spot price) daily closes for volatility calc

behavior: When 20-day rolling volatility of natural gas prices spikes above 2-year 95th percentile, mean reversion in energy equities often follows as supply shocks resolve.

market_impact.rationale: Extreme gas price volatility signals supply disruption; reversal attracts energy sector value buyers and reduces hedge costs.

trade_logic.entry: If 20-day rolling vol of DHHNGSP > 95th percentile over 2 years and XLE closes up >1% following a down day
trade_logic.exit: After 8 trading days or when 20-day vol falls below 80th percentile

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal geopolitical and weather shocks drive gas price spikes multiple times per quarter.

idea: EV Charger Network Expansion Sentiment Surge

data.source: OpenChargeMap API weekly count of newly added chargers across US; pair with Google Trends weekly search volume for 'EV charging stations near me'

behavior: Spikes in charger installation and concurrent surge in consumer searches signal bullish infrastructure narrative, lifting XLK (chip/software) and XLI (automotive) positioning.

market_impact.rationale: EV charging expansion is a positive signal for semiconductor and software demand in automotive electrification.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly new charger count rises >20% QoQ and Google Trends 'EV charging' searches rise >30% YoY
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or if charger growth rate decelerates below 10% QoQ

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Government subsidy cycles and corporate announcements cluster charger expansion; signal fires 3–4 times per year.

idea: Mortgage Rate Compression Refinance Wave Fade

data.source: FRED series MORTGAGE30US (30-year mortgage rate) daily; pair with Google Trends weekly searches for 'mortgage refinance' and 'home equity loan'

behavior: When MORTGAGE30US drops >0.5% over 2 weeks and refinance search interest spikes, consumer discretionary spending rebounds but eventual rate stabilization causes mean reversion.

market_impact.rationale: Falling rates unlock household liquidity and home equity; consumers spend on discretionary goods and services.

trade_logic.entry: If MORTGAGE30US drops >0.5% in 2 weeks AND Google Trends 'refinance' searches rise >40% YoY, buy XLY
trade_logic.exit: After 12 trading days or when rates stabilize for 3+ consecutive days

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Fed policy shifts and bond market repricing trigger rate drops several times per year, reliably firing this signal.

idea: Copper Contango Collapse Industrial Demand Proxy

data.source: FRED series MMNRNJ (Copper prices, spot) daily for spot; pair with CME futures curve slope via price_only adapter (HG nearest vs 6-month forward prices)

behavior: When copper spot rallies but forward curve flattens (contango narrows), market is signaling near-term demand strength but supply confidence; bullish for materials.

market_impact.rationale: Copper demand elasticity is high for construction, manufacturing, and power; curve shape is a sensitive real-economy gauge.

trade_logic.entry: If copper spot rises >2% in 3 days AND 6-month forward premium (contango) shrinks to <1.5% annualized
trade_logic.exit: After 7 trading days or if contango widens beyond 2.5%

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Commodity curve dynamics shift weekly with supply/demand news; this signal fires 2–3 times per month.

idea: Healthcare Procedure Google Trends Demand Resurgence

data.source: Google Trends weekly search volume for 'cosmetic surgery near me', 'dental implant cost', 'laser eye surgery'

behavior: Spikes in elective procedure searches signal consumer confidence and disposable income recovery; bullish for consumer discretionary and healthcare services.

market_impact.rationale: Elective healthcare spending is a proxy for consumer financial health and willingness to spend on non-essentials.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Google Trends for elective procedure searches rises >50% YoY and XLY closes up >0.5% that week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or if search interest falls below baseline for 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal consumer confidence waves (post-bonus, tax refunds, holiday spending) reliably drive elective procedure searches.

idea: Airline Load Factor Contraction Fare Collapse Signal

data.source: BTS (Bureau of Transportation Statistics) weekly airline load factor data via bts_airline_load_factor adapter

behavior: When airline load factors drop >5% week-over-week, it signals weakening travel demand and airlines will cut fares aggressively, pressuring XLY and supporting XLP.

market_impact.rationale: Falling load factors and fare wars erode airline and leisure travel margins; consumer is trading down or reducing discretionary trips.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly load factor falls >5% WoW and is below 12-week MA
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or when load factor recovers above 12-week MA for 2 consecutive weeks

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal travel patterns and economic news cause load factor swings monthly; signal fires 2–4 times per quarter.

idea: Agricultural Commodity Volatility Inversion Farmland Stress

data.source: FRED series PPIACO (Corn price) and PPIWHE (Wheat price) daily; calculate 10-day rolling volatility for each

behavior: When corn and wheat volatility invert (one spikes while the other collapses), it signals supply/demand dislocations that stress rural credit and farm equipment demand.

market_impact.rationale: Agricultural equipment manufacturers (John Deere, AGCO) are sensitive to farm profitability; commodity volatility inversions signal margin compression.

trade_logic.entry: If 10-day corn vol rises >50% while wheat vol falls >30%, and XLI closes down >1%
trade_logic.exit: After 6 trading days or when both volatilities normalize within 20% of each other

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seasonal weather, USDA reports, and geopolitical events drive commodity vol spikes monthly.

idea: Bankruptcy Filings Surge Corporate Stress Wave

data.source: US Courts public bankruptcy filing data (Chapter 7, 11, 13) via html_table scrape; weekly aggregation of new filings

behavior: Spikes in corporate bankruptcy filings (Chapter 11) signal debt stress across the economy; lag 1–2 weeks before credit spreads widen and equities selloff.

market_impact.rationale: Rising corporate bankruptcies increase bank loan losses and reduce confidence in credit quality; financial sector reprices risk higher.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly Chapter 11 filings exceed 12-week MA by >20% and XLF closes down >0.5%
trade_logic.exit: After 10 trading days or when weekly filings fall below 12-week MA

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Economic cycles and credit tightening events drive bankruptcy waves; signal fires 2–3 times per year.
